extension.summary: Stream Live Indian Channels & VOD Content From JioTV on Kodi
extension.description: Enjoy Live TV experience and Video on Demand content in Kodi.
extension.news:
v1.1.2 - Fixed "context has no attribute: add_item" error in menus - Fixed VOD playback stability (addressed 400 errors) - Fixed invalid inputstream.adaptive resolution property - Improved API request encoding for VOD streams
v1.1.1 - Added: Safety Shield (Auto Backup & Restore for account settings). - Fixed: Addon update failures on Windows (Faster service shutdown).
extension.disclaimer: This plugin is not officially commissioned/supported by Jio. The trademark "Jio" is registered by "Reliance Corporate IT Park Limited (RCITPL)"
